CHANGE RECORD 
 
When the quality of the products change s, the QuID is updated  and a row is added to this table.  The 
third column specifies which sections or sub -sections have been updated.  The fourth column should 
mention the version of the product to which the change applies.

3.0 23/12/2016 All [EIS Apr 2017: IBI-V3 version] 
Update of the fresh water forcing: inclusion 
of an additional climatological runoff 
forcing (in monthly frequency) to 
complement the previous forcing based 
only on 33 river point daily freshwater 
sources.

B. Levier 
P. Lorente

Issue Date § Description of Change Author Validated By 
4.0 23/12/2017 All [EIS Mar 2018: IBI-V4 version] 
New Data Assimilation scheme based on 
SAMv2 in place. 
New hourly3D dataset, covering the 
coastal and shelf IBI regions. 
Update of the historic best estimates on 
the Copernicus Marine catalogue. 
M. G. Sotillo 
B. Levier 
P. Lorente 
E. Álvarez 
Fanjul 
4.1 03/12/2019 All [EIS Dec 2019: IBI-V4 version] 
Delivery of new dataset with 15 minutes 
frequency data for sea level and surface 
currents. 
K. Guihou 
R. Aznar 
A. Amo 
P. Lorente 
M. G. Sotillo 
M.G. Sotillo 
4.2 03/04/2020 All [EIS Jul 2020: IBI-V4 version] 
Integration of new tidal forcing. 
Use of ECMWF hourly atmospheric forcing. 
K. Guihou 
R. Aznar 
M.G. Sotillo 
5.0 25/09/2020 All [EIS Dec 2020: IBI-V5 version] 
Implementation of the off-line wave 
current coupling (only forecast run). 
Model upgrade. 
Update of the historic best estimates on 
the catalogue. 
Modification of product/datasets names 
following new convention. 
B. Levier 
R. Aznar 
A. Amo 
L. Aouf 
M. Ghantous 
M.G. Sotillo 
5.1 15/01/2021 V, VI [EIS May 2021: IBI-V5 version] 
Update of freshwater forcing (upgrade of 
coastal runoff). 
K. Guihou 
R. Aznar 
A. Amo 
M.G. Sotillo 
6.0 15/06/2022 All [EIS November 2022: IBI-V6 version] 
Data Assimilation module update (new 
modes, MDT derived for a long free run, 
new model equivalent of SLA, SST HR 
+4D…). 
Adjustment of Gibraltar transport 
(correction of SSH at Med OBC).. 
Update of the historic best estimates on 
the catalogue. 
B. Levier 
G. Reffray 
R. Escudier 
E. Gutknecht 
A. Amo 
R. Aznar 
M. G. Sotillo 
6.1 16/06/2023 V, VI [EIS November 2023: IBI-V6 version] 
Upgraded system nested into the new 
GLO-PHY NRT system (1/12° res., Nov 2022 
EIS)

6.2 30/06/2024  [EIS November 2024: IBI-V6 version] 
Addition of new variables: vertical velocity 
and detided SSH and surface UV using 
Doodson filter. Extension of forecast length 
from 5 to 10 days.
